_comment: USD per 1M tokens. litellm + openrouter both return null cost for deepseek-v4-flash, so cost is computed deterministically from captured token counts x these rates. Set to your actual contract/API rate for an exact figure; defaults below mirror DeepSeek's published deepseek-chat tiers (cache-miss input / cache-hit input / output) as the closest public reference. Reproducible: anyone can re-run package_submission.py and get the same cost.

deepseek-v4-flash.source: default=deepseek-chat public tiers (v4-flash rate not published as of cutoff); override with contract rate

deepseek-v4-pro.source: default placeholder; override with contract rate
